Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "HARVEYSMITHSHOWJUMPER-C200-C000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c200 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Harvey Smith Showjumper (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $C200 which: 1. turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. copies 512 bytes of data from $D000 down to $0100 so that the dump can start at $0400 3. sets the stack pointer to $DF to give the correct next available location on the stack (i.e. within the data copied in step 2) 4. sets the correct border colour in $D020 ($06) 5. finally jumps to the start address of $C000 (it doesn't use RTS because of the stack manipulation above)
Note: the breakpoint to use for dumping is $C032 - the start address of $C000 skips the manual protection step.
